h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned with significant leading space.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, centered above tables or figures, typically includes a label and colon.
h2.example_text: Table 1: Percentage of Government Positions Held by Women...

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Highlighted data row or sub-total category within a dataset.

visual_matchers.pattern: Text starting with 'Source:' below a table
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Data attribution and bibliographic reference for the preceding visual element.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top margin contains page number on the left and author names (running head) in a lighter gray serif font.
